ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "export_data" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the data is for */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category for the export data */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month for the export data */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year for the export data */,
  "current_export_value" REAL /* Current export value */,
  "previous_export_value" REAL /* Previous export value */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the export value */,
  "trade_value_usd" REAL /* Trade value in US dollars */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month of the export data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the export data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES trade_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_data_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES trade_months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_data_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency to US dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "hs_code" TEXT /* Harmonized System (HS) code for the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year corresponding to the trade data */,
  "is_current_year" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the API key */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* The actual API key value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the API key was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the API key is active */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use of the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "export_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country for the trend */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category for the trend */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the trend */,
  "increase_percentage" REAL /* Percentage increase or decrease in exports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_trends_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_trends_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES trade_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_trends_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for the data source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data source is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data import (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "imported_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who imported the data */,
  "imported_rows" INTEGER /* Number of rows imported */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_imported_by FOREIGN KEY ("imported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the export data being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id")
)
